title: rubus × hylaeus
intro: Rubus × hylaeus, also known as the hybrid raspberry, is a cross between the European raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the fragrant raspberry (Rubus fruticosus). This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and antifungal activities, which can help to prevent infections and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Rubus × hylaeus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support digestive function. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
